title: Divya Shakti
desc: A corrupt cop, a newspaper editor who glosses over mob activities, and a young reporter striving to tell the truth all combine in this explosive tale.

desc: A reporter bears witness to a murder case, but in the process, his family gets threatened.

title: King Uncle
desc: Ashok, an austere man, experiences a profound shift in his life when an orphan girl enters his world, infusing it with warmth and meaning that he had long forgotten.

desc: Ashok, an austere man, finds new purpose in his dull life when he meets an oprhan girl.

desc: Industrialist Ashok Bansal's harsh ways push away his siblings. But when orphan girl Munna enters their lives, she slowly softens his tough heart and changes the family.

title: Sandwich
desc: Sher Singh has two wives, Nisha and Sweety, and juggles his time between them. However, when his two wives cross paths, his troubles increase manifold leading to hilarious situations.

desc: Sher Singh struggles to manage time between his two wives living in the same city.

title: Sandwich
desc: Shekar's feelings for Nisha hit a snag when his sister's wedding depends on him marrying someone else. Love and family ties clash, making for a messy romantic dilemma!

title: Teri Meherbaniyan
desc: Ram, an honest man, falls in love with a woman named Bijli and goes on to help the people of her village. However, the region's corrupt leader, Thakur Vijay Singh, soon begins to plot against him.

desc: A young man incurs the wrath of a corrupt leader when he helps the people of his village.

desc: Love leads Ajay to take charge of his father's criminal empire.

desc: Nageshwar hands over his empire to his son Ajay, but Nageshwar's unhappy associates kidnap his grandson Gopal.

desc: Love leads Ajay down a new path when he is expected to inherit his father's criminal empire, bringing along perils that could either tear their family apart or solidify their bond.

desc: Two brothers are murdered by their uncle while seeking justice for their father's death.

title: Karan Arjun
desc: Durga's two sons, Karan and Arjun, set out to avenge their father's death, only to get themselves killed by their evil uncle. Years later, the two are reincarnated to bring justice.

desc: Karan and Arjun, two brothers driven by revenge, are murdered by their uncle while seeking justice for their father's death. However, they resurrect years later to settle their unfinished score.

desc: An upright officer is wrongly accused of murder while probing a sensitive case. Escaping prison, he disguises himself as a woman to expose the truth and bring justice.

desc: A lawyer and his lover plan a robbery to fulfil his dream of opening a legal institute.

desc: An honest officer is framed for murder when he starts investigating a case.
